question: Analyze SkyJet Corp's 2020-2023 commercial aircraft and defense deliveries from annual reports (fictional example)

rubrics.point: Contains a table showing SJ-700 series delivery numbers for each year from 2020 to 2023
Contains delivery numbers for SJ-900 widebody series across the analysis period
